context: Tests whether the agent applies Phase 4 validation methods correctly: Python syntax using ast.parse, JavaScript syntax using node --check, command flag validity by consulting --help output, and file reference existence checks. The SKILL.md provided contains a Python syntax error, and a broken file reference.

checklist.name: Python via ast.parse
checklist.description: Uses Python's ast.parse() (or equivalent ast module usage) to validate the Python code block — not just visual inspection

checklist.name: Python error identified
checklist.description: Correctly identifies the syntax error in the Python snippet (the missing closing parenthesis in the function signature `def run_ingestion(source_url: str, dest_table: str:`)

checklist.name: JavaScript via node --check
checklist.description: Uses `node --check` to validate the JavaScript code block — not just visual inspection

checklist.name: Command flag validation
checklist.description: Attempts to validate command flags from the bash snippet (e.g. checks `pipeline validate --help` or equivalent) rather than assuming flags are correct

checklist.name: File reference check
checklist.description: Checks whether the files referenced in markdown links (SETUP_GUIDE.md, TROUBLESHOOT.md) exist in the skill bundle directory

checklist.name: Broken reference identified
checklist.description: Correctly identifies that SETUP_GUIDE.md is referenced but does not exist in the bundle

checklist.name: Validation before application
checklist.description: Report is framed as checks to perform BEFORE applying any changes (not after) — explicitly validates current state

checklist.name: Per-check pass/fail
checklist.description: Report shows clear pass/fail (or ✓/✗) for each individual check, not just a summary

checklist.name: Fix suggestions
checklist.description: Provides specific suggested fixes for each issue found (corrected Python syntax, how to create missing file)
